title: [ExportVerilog] Add KEEP attr to Vivado array index bug workaround
body:
Rename the `disallowArrayIndexInlining` lowering option to `mitigateVivadoArrayIndexConstPropBug` to more clearly convey the fact that this is intended as a Vivado bug workaround.

Since this is now Vivado-specific, add the `(* keep = "true" *)` SV attribute to the array index wire, which is necessary to properly mitigate the Vivado synthesis issue we were observing.
